clips.title: Weightless
clips.prompt: Surreal dreamlike style, ethereal grade. A softly glowing room where hundreds of sheets of paper drift weightlessly through the air. A person floats gently among the papers, serene, hair and clothes lifting, a dream logic to it all. A person in flowing light clothes. Soft diffused glow, floating particles, dreamlike mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Surface
clips.prompt: Surreal dreamlike style, ethereal grade. A vast calm sea at dawn, mirror-flat, pastel sky. A person walks impossibly on the surface of the water, gentle ripples spreading, a serene dream logic. A person in flowing clothes. Soft pastel light, glassy water, dreamlike mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Bloom
clips.prompt: Surreal dreamlike style, ethereal grade. An endless field of softly glowing luminous flowers under a twilight sky, gentle floating pollen of light. A person stands amid the glowing blooms, wonderstruck and serene, a dream logic to the scene. A person in flowing clothes. Soft magical glow, floating light, dreamlike mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Doors
clips.prompt: Surreal dreamlike style, ethereal grade. An impossible endless hallway where many doors float and hang at odd angles in soft mist. A person stands among the floating doors, curious and calm, a surreal dream logic. A person in simple clothes. Soft hazy light, floating doors, dreamlike mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Two Moons
clips.prompt: Surreal dreamlike style, ethereal grade. A quiet hilltop at night under a strange sky with two glowing moons, soft stars. A person stands gazing up in serene wonder at the impossible twin moons, a dream logic. A person in flowing clothes. Soft blue night glow, two moons, dreamlike mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Drift
clips.prompt: Surreal dreamlike style, ethereal grade. A softly lit living room where the furniture floats and drifts weightlessly in the air. A person stands calmly as chairs and lamps drift around them, a gentle surreal dream logic. A person in home clothes. Soft warm glow, floating furniture, dreamlike mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
